_comment: Team notifications. Copy to notifications.json, fill it in, and upload to
Every dailies drop (turntable / look review / playblast) then notifies the
team with the full publish info. Validate with: flumen notify-test.
Both blocks are optional. Discord needs no credentials — create a webhook
on the channel (Edit channel -> Integrations -> Webhooks) and paste its URL.
Email wants an SMTP account; the password lives here (this file is on the
team-private server, machines sync it automatically) or per-machine in .env
via password_env. NEVER put real credentials in THIS example file — it is
tracked in git; only notifications.json (gitignored) holds real values.
The syncsketch block auto-uploads every reviewable (turntable, look review,
playblast, review still) into a per-day review 'Dailies YYYY-MM-DD' of the
